Enterprise Pilot Room

A pilot-ready review room for evaluating The Agent Command Center with clear scope, roles, success criteria, risks, safety boundaries, and go/no-go decisions.

Open Executive Control Room Open Observability Command Wall Open Continual Harness Operator Open Runtime Fleet Open Legal / Copyright

1. Pilot status banner

Pilot status: unknown
Pilot scope: unknown
Recommended next step: none

2. What this pilot is

  • A controlled enterprise review.
  • A verification of safety boundaries.
  • An audit of system readiness.

3. What this pilot is not

  • This room prepares an enterprise pilot review. It does not grant runtime permission.
  • Pilot approval is not command execution.
  • Limited pilot approval does not activate the full fleet.

4. Stakeholder roles

RoleDescriptionResponsibility

5. Pilot scope

Total registered agents: 47,979
Total departments: 1,777
Total units: 5,331
Total families: 175
Full fleet cap: 47,979
Current live runtime agents: 0

Any future runtime authorization must be explicit, scoped, logged, and separately approved.

8. Safety boundaries

No page in this pilot room runs shell commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions.

Command execution: disabled
Deploy execution: disabled
Rollback execution: disabled
Alert sending: disabled
Arbitrary shell execution: disabled
Runtime permission granted: false

GroupCriterionMeasurementStatus

7. Risk register

RiskSummaryLevelMitigationStatus

9. Technical readiness summary

Security review required: true
Technical review required: true
Stakeholder review required: true

Legal review required: true
